fields.label: Title
fields.name: title
fields.description: The headline for this article. Appears at the top of the page and in search results.

fields.label: Publish Date
fields.name: pubDate
fields.description: The date this article was published. Used for sorting and display.

fields.label: Description
fields.name: description
fields.description: A brief summary of the article. Shown in article previews and search engine results.

fields.label: Author
fields.name: author
fields.description: The name of the person who wrote this article.

fields.label: Featured Image
fields.name: image
fields.description: This is a large image that appears at the beginning of your article. Recommended dimensions: 1200x630px

fields.label: Tags
fields.name: tags
fields.description: Keywords to categorize this article (e.g., 'tournament', 'events'). Helps with filtering and search.

fields.label: Body
fields.name: body
fields.description: The full content of the article. Use the toolbar to format text, add headings, links, and images.

fields.label: Title
fields.name: title
fields.description: A heading for this article's gallery section.

fields.label: Description
fields.name: description
fields.description: A short description displayed above the gallery.

fields.label: Media type
fields.name: mediaType
fields.description: Select whether this item is a photo or video.

fields.label: Image
fields.name: image
fields.description: Upload the image file for the gallery. Recommended dimensions: 1200x630px

fields.label: Vimeo video URL
fields.name: vimeoUrl
fields.description: Paste the Vimeo video URL (e.g., 'https://vimeo.com/1110587814')

fields.label: Title
fields.name: title
fields.description: A short title for this media item.

fields.label: Caption
fields.name: caption
fields.description: A brief description shown below the image or video.

fields.label: Credit
fields.name: credit
fields.description: Attribution for the photographer or videographer.

fields.label: Media type
fields.name: mediaType
fields.description: Select whether this gallery item is a photo or video.

fields.label: Image
fields.name: image
fields.description: Upload the image file for the gallery. Recommended dimensions: 1200x630px

fields.label: Vimeo video URL
fields.name: vimeoUrl
fields.description: Paste the Vimeo video URL (e.g., 'https://vimeo.com/1110587814')

fields.label: Publish Date
fields.name: pubDate
fields.description: This is the date that will be used to sort your images in the gallery. It does not have to be the date the photo was taken.

fields.label: Title
fields.name: title
fields.description: A short title for this gallery item.

fields.label: Caption
fields.name: caption
fields.description: A brief description shown below the image or video.

fields.label: Credit
fields.name: credit
fields.description: Attribution for the photographer or videographer.

fields.label: Question
fields.name: question
fields.description: The question as it will appear on the FAQ page.

fields.label: Sort Priority
fields.name: sortPriority
fields.description: Determines the order of the FAQs. Lower numbers (like 0 or 1) appear first.

fields.label: Body
fields.name: body
fields.description: The answer to the question. Use the toolbar to format text, add links, etc.

fields.label: Term
fields.name: term
fields.description: The Japanese, Okinawan, or martial arts term (e.g., 'Kata', 'Sensei').

fields.label: Pronunciation
fields.name: pronunciation
fields.description: How to pronounce the term (e.g., 'kah-tah'). Displayed next to the term on the dictionary page.

fields.label: Definition
fields.name: definition
fields.description: The meaning and context of the term.

fields.label: Title
fields.name: title
fields.description: A short label for this announcement (e.g., 'Youth Karate - Apr 6'). This is used for organizational purposes in the CMS and does not appear on the public site.

fields.label: Class
fields.name: className
fields.description: Which class this announcement is for

fields.label: Date
fields.name: date
fields.description: The class date this announcement applies to

fields.label: Class Cancelled
fields.name: cancelled
fields.description: Check this box if the class is cancelled on this date. This will update the 'Next Class' display to skip this date.

fields.label: Message
fields.name: message
fields.description: Announcement details, 100 characters max (e.g., 'Holiday — no class', 'Class moved to 7 PM')

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
